library.title: Ububiko bw'ibitabu
library.subtitle: Ijwi ryawe n’imigambi ya gitari, kuva ku ciyumviro gushika ku gusohora.

no_results.title: Nta migambi yabonetse
no_results.description: Gerageza guhindura ubushakashatsi canke akayunguruzo k'imimerere.

empty.title: Ububiko bwawe bw'ibitabu burasa
empty.description: Tangira umugambi mushasha uhereye ku ntango, canke ushiremwo ivyo ufise kuri disiki.

project_dialog.title: Umugambi mushasha
project_dialog.description: Uyihe izina maze uhitemwo uburyo bwo gufata amajwi.

album_dialog.title: Alubumu nshasha
album_dialog.description: Itsinda ry’imigambi ijyanye n’ivyo mu gitabu.

album.empty: Nta migambi iri muri iyi album.

delete_project.confirm_description: Ivyo bikuraho umugambi n’ivyo vyose biwufatamwo. Ivyo ntibishobora gusubirwamwo.

record.title: Inyandiko
record.subtitle: Fata igishushanyo gisukuye, urabe ingero zawe, hanyuma ukurikize inyandiko.

guide.title: Igihe kirongowe
guide.subtitle: Reka umumenyereza akugendere mu nyandiko intambwe ku yindi, kuva ku gususurutsa gushika ku majambo avuzwe.
guide.select_project_device: Hitamwo umugambi n'igikoresho co kwinjiza kugira ngo wandike intambwe uhereye hano.
guide.no_record_step: Intambwe yo gususurutsa — nta gufata amajwi bikenewe.
guide.complete_body: Wanditse intambwe yose y’inyandiko. Subira ku rubuga rw'amajwi rw'umugambi maze uhitemwo amafoto ukunda.

best2min.hint: Ikora isesengura ry’inguvu n’ugusobanuka mu gihe cose kugira ngo uronke idirisha ryayo rikomeye ry’iminota 2 — urashobora guhindura urutonde n’ukuboko inyuma.
best2min.unavailable: Isesengura ryiza ry'iminota 2 ntiriraboneka kuri iyi server.

record.takes_empty: Nta nkuru zafashwe muri iki kiganiro.

no_takes.title: Ntaco birafata
no_takes.description: Kwandika igishushanyo gishasha canke kwinjiza dosiye iriho.

audio.delete_take_confirm_description: Amajwi atagiramwo ivyatsi be na verisiyo yose yatunganijwe bizokurwaho.

export.title: Gusohora hanze gufata
export.description: Gutanga dosiye ya nyuma kuva kuri verisiyo yatunganijwe.

notes.placeholder: Ivyanditswe ku buntu kuri uyu mugambi...

lyrics.placeholder: Amajambo y'indirimbo uyandike hano. Koresha paleti iri ku ruhande kugira ngo winjize ama meta-tags ya Suno.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: Umwandiko uriho uzosubirizwa na verisiyo yabitswe kuri {{date}} .
lyrics.metatags_hint: Fyonda kuri tag kugira ngo uyishiremwo ku nzira.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: Ntivyemejwe — bishobora kutagira ico bikoze ku ciyumviro.

prompts.preview_empty: Hitamwo igishushanyo maze wuzuze ibihinduka kugira ngo ubone imbere y'igihe.
prompts.char_count_warning: Inyuguti zirenga 1000 zishobora gukurwako na Suno.

stems.title: Amajwi na gitari
stems.empty: Iyi take ntiyari bwatandukanye. Run separation kugira ngo wumve amajwi na gitari mu kwitandukanya.
stems.capability_missing: Ugutandukanya inkomoko ntikwashizwe kuri iyi server.
stems.unavailable: Ugutandukanya ijwi/gitari ntibiraboneka kuri iyi server.

import.title: Gushiramwo
import.subtitle: Zana imigambi isanzwe iri kuri disiki mu bubiko bw’ibitabu.

step1.title: Kurondera ububiko
step1.description: Erekana kuri dosiye y'umuzi n'imigambi yawe n'imirongo yawe.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg ntiyabonetse — amadosiye akeneye guhindurwa azosimburwa.

step2.title: Ibintu vyo gusubiramwo
step2.description: Suzuma amazina, ivyicaro, n'ibizoza imbere y'uko wemeza.

step3.title: Gushiramwo
step3.description: Wemeze ko ukope amadosiye maze ureme imigambi.
step3.copy_originals: Kopa amadosiye y'umwimerere mu bubiko bw'ibitabu
step3.done_description: Imigambi iri musi yaremewe mu bubiko bwawe bw’ibitabu.

templates.title: Ibigereranyo
templates.subtitle: Ivyitegererezo vy'ivyifuzo bishobora gusubirwamwo n'ibimenyetso vya Suno.

editor.template_hint: Ikimenyetso aho umuhinduzi wese ari n'izina ryawo rizingiye mu bimenyetso bibiri vy'uruzitiro — nk'akarorero, umuhinduzi witwa "ubwoko" aba ubwoko buzingiye mu bimenyetso bibiri vy'ugufungura n'ivy'ugufunga bibiri.

metatags.title: Meta-ibimenyetso
metatags.subtitle: Ivyiyumviro vy’imiterere n’imiterere Suno yemera imbere mu majambo.

settings.title: Amagenamiterere
settings.subtitle: Amakuru ya sisitemu, ururimi, n'ivyo ukunda.
settings.lufs_target_hint: Ikoreshwa nk’iciyumviro co gutangura igihe coherezwa hanze bifata. Igiharuro ca Suno cicara hafi -14 LUFS.

guide.title: Uburongozi bwo kwandika Suno
guide.subtitle: Uko wofata ijwi n’igitari bifata ivyo bituma uronka ibisubizo vyiza.
guide.intro: Suno ikora neza cane iyo ifise ibisobanuro bisukuye kandi bitagiramwo amakenga. Iyi nkuru ivuga ku kwitegura, ingero z’intumbero, n’inyandiko yo kwandika y’iminota 3–5.

prep.title: Gutegura
prep.body: Gufata amajwi mu cumba givuwe canke mu cumba gifise ibikoresho vyinshi vyoroshe (amabarabara, amatapi, impuzu ziri mu kabati). Zima aba fans n’ikintu cose kivuga. Susurutsa ijwi ryawe iminota 5 imbere yo gufata amajwi.

levels.title: Ingero: -12 gushika kuri -6 dBFS
levels.body: Intumbero y’isonga riri hagati ya -12 na -6 dBFS ku gipimo. Munsi y’urwo rugero, urusaku rwo mu nyuma rurarushiriza kugaragara; hejuru yayo, ingorane zo gucagura ziraduga. Koresha igipimo kiri kuri paji y’Inyandiko kugira ngo ushireho inyungu yawe imbere y’uko utangura.

distance.title: Urugendo rwa mikro: cm 15–30
distance.body: Gumana cm 15 gushika kuri 30 uvuye kuri mikoro. Hafi kuruta ivyo birenze urugero amajambo y’ugutera imbere n’ingaruka zo hafi; kure cane itoragura ijwi ry’ivyumba ryinshi n’urusaku.

script.title: Kwandika inyandiko
script.vowels: Inyuguti zikomeye — a, e, i, o, u .
script.dynamics: Impinduka: gutangura neza, guhera n'ijwi rirenga
script.spoken_phrase: Invugo imwe ivuzwe, kugira ngo Suno ashobore gusoma ijwi ryawe

expectations.title: Ivyo Suno yiteze .
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, yumutse (nta n’ijwi canke ingaruka), iminota 3 gushika ku 5 y’ishingiro. Iminota 2 isukuye cane, iserukira cane iyo umuntu afata, ni yo akenshi itanga ivyiza kuruta ibindi vyose.

suno_voice_full.name: Ijwi ryose rya Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: Iminota 5 iyobowe: gususurutsa, inyuguti, umunzane, ibice bibiri vy’indirimbo, uguhinduka, n’invugo ivugwa.

step.warmup_inst: Rekura n’ugusemerera, gutera iminwa (brrr), n’ugutera induru yoroshe nk’umunota umwe. Ntaco bimaze gufata amajwi — ni ugutuma umuhogo wawe uruhuka gusa imbere yo kuririmba.
step.vowels_inst: Fata inyuguti imwe imwe yose — a, e, i, o, u — mu masegonda 3 canke 4 ku rugero rwawe rwiza, ukoresheje ijwi ridahinduka. Ivyo bifasha Suno gutoragura ijwi ryawe ryiza.
step.scales_inst: Ririmba urugero rworoshe hejuru hanyuma hasi, kuri "la" canke "na". Ntibikenewe ko biba bitunganye — intumbero ni ugukora ikarita y’ijwi ryawe.
step.section_inst: Ririmba imirongo 8 gushika ku 16 y’indirimbo, ufise intumbero nyayo ushaka gushikiriza. Gushira imbere ugusobanuka n’ukubaho kuruta ugutungana kw’ubuhinga.
step.section2_inst: Ririmba izindi ndirimbo 8 gushika ku 16 — vyiza ni ukuvuga ijwi ry’indirimbo canke igice gitandukanye n’ica mbere. Ugutandukanya cane birafasha uwo mugereranyo kwiga ijwi ryawe.
step.dynamics_inst: Ririmba iyo mvugo nyene utangura mu buryo bworoshe cane ugaheza ugaheza n’ijwi rirenga, utavyura umuhogo wawe. Ivyo vyerekana Suno ijwi ryawe ry’inguvu.
step.spoken_inst: Vuga — nturirimbe — amajambo magufi kandi asanzwe, nk’aho woba uriko urayaga. Ivyo bifasha Suno kumenya ijwi ryawe nyaryo.

errors.device_busy: Igikoresho c’amajwi kiriko kirakoreshwa n’iyindi porogarama.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg ntiyishizweho — yishiremwo kugira ngo uhindure iyi dosiye.
errors.disk_full: Nta mwanya uhagije wo kuri disk.
errors.import_path_not_found: Inzira yo kwinjiza mu gihugu ntiyabonetse.
